text.title: Active Listening Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the RASA interview-script artefact. Validator enforces required keys, open-question discipline, and reflective-formula presence.

section.title: Schema

example.code: { "goal": "Understand why deployment process takes 4 hours.", "interviewee_profile": "DevOps lead, 5 years on the team, skeptical of new tooling.", "receive_opener": "I'll close the laptop for the next 30 minutes. Take whatever space you need.", "appreciate_phrases": ["I see.", "Go on.", "That makes sense."], "summarize_starters": [ "So if I understand you, the bottleneck is...", "What I'm hearing is that the manual step...", "Let me play that back: the data export..." ], "ask_questions": [ "Walk me through what happens after the export.", "How does the current process affect your team's morning?", "What does a good day with this look like?", "Tell me about the last time it broke.", "In what way would you change it if you had a free week?" ], "reflective_prompts": ["It sounds like you're frustrated because the same step breaks every Monday."], "silence_cue": "Pause 3-5 seconds after each answer before asking the next question.", "channel": "live-video" }

example.note: Closed openers (Is, Do) forbidden; missing receive_opener, summarize_starters, reflective_prompts, silence_cue.

list.item: Any ask_question opening with Is, Do, Did, Are, Were, Will, Would.
Reflective prompt without the "sounds like / seems like / I hear that" anchor.
Missing silence_cue in async-text channel (substitute prompt required).
